first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations. The justification, strengths, and concerns are also substantively identical, with only minor variations in phrasing that fall within the bounds of normal model noise. The core assessment of the candidate being overqualified and not primarily a Java developer remains consistent and is not influenced by the change in location from Berlin to Lagos.
